---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in simr
---

Please note that this issue tracker is for reporting bugs in the `simr` package.


Due to time constraints I cannot support for the statistical aspects of your power analysis.
However, do note that any unclear usage or unhelpful documentation in `simr` is still considered a "bug".

If you have found a bug, please attempt to provide a reproducible example to help me isolate the problem.
